title: Sasha totem (No longer updated)
description: Hello everyone, I'm Sasha and I'm the announcer of the channel "Mood Workshop"
body:
## Where is the update?
**I don't want to update this resource pack, forget it.**

## Who is Sasha?
This is a meme that can now save you from death :)
The meme itself is taken from here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UVjFuj8LwHU

Sasha can save you from any player, even from those who fight you to the last

## Version Warning
If you see a red warning that the version of the texture pack you are playing on is not supported, don't worry, it's just a misunderstanding on the part of the texture pack itself, it may not be the case on older versions.
